title: Graft exposes creature-as-equip stat rule

card.rawText: Players may equip creatures from their hand to their primary creature as Infinite equip magic cards. Add their base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier to the equipped card.

effect.value: Players may equip creatures from their hand to their primary creature as Infinite equip magic cards. Add their base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier to the equipped card.

plan.title: Graft exposes creature-as-equip stat rule
plan.summary: Place Graft as field magic and verify the runtime recognizes its field rule for turning hand creatures into Infinite equip stat sources.

notes: Read text first: Players may equip creatures from their hand to their primary creature as Infinite equip magic cards. Add their base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier to the equipped card.

steps: Place Graft in the field magic slot.
Keep a creature in hand as the potential Infinite equip source.
Verify the static stat-rule marker is available.

expectedAssertions.label: Graft remains active as field magic

manualVerification: A later live or deeper headless route should actually equip a hand creature and transfer its base dice/modifier.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Place Graft as field magic and verify the runtime recognizes its field rule for turning hand creatures into Infinite equip stat sources.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
